seoTitle: Connect Typeform to Google Sheets (Native Integration)
metaDescription: Learn how to sync Typeform responses directly into Google Sheets using Typeform's native connect integration.
intro: Typeform's native Google Sheets integration lets every form response flow automatically into a spreadsheet without any manual copying. This guide covers linking your Typeform account to Google Sheets, mapping individual questions to spreadsheet columns, and confirming that live submissions sync correctly.

steps.heading: Open your form's Connect tab
steps.body: From your Typeform dashboard, open the target form and navigate to the Connect settings toolbar.

steps.heading: Find Google Sheets in the integrations list
steps.body: Locate the Google Sheets card among the available third-party integration options.

steps.heading: Authenticate your Google account
steps.body: Click Connect and sign into your Google account, granting the necessary data transfer permissions.

steps.heading: Choose your spreadsheet destination
steps.body: Decide whether to auto-generate a new spreadsheet or connect to an existing one, then map your form questions to columns.

steps.heading: Activate the integration
steps.body: Turn on the pipeline so future form submissions flow automatically into the sheet.

steps.heading: Test with a live submission
steps.body: Submit a test response and check Google Sheets to confirm the data populated correctly.

faq.question: Do I need a paid Typeform plan for this integration?
faq.answer: Native integrations like Google Sheets are generally available, but check your specific plan's feature list since some advanced options may be gated.

faq.question: Can I connect one form to multiple spreadsheets?
faq.answer: Typically each form connects to a single spreadsheet destination through this native integration, though you can adjust which sheet it points to.

faq.question: What happens to existing responses when I connect the integration?
faq.answer: Usually only new responses submitted after the connection is activated will sync — check your specific setup for historical data behavior.

faq.question: Why isn't a response showing up in my sheet?
faq.answer: Double-check that the integration is active and that your Google account permissions haven't been revoked or expired.
